content_body:
We LOVED this cabin. Clean, well stocked with items in the kitchen, comfortable beds, lots of space to sit and relax. Even the outdoor area and furniture were clean and comfortable to sit on. The view from the deck was stunning. This was a much needed getaway and we hope to come back! 

Our favorite part was being able to spend family quality time together in a comfortable beautiful home with a great view.
title: Amazing Place!
